ℹ️ About Backups

Auto-backup: Runs silently every hour while the page is open. It also runs whenever you make changes to critical data (orders, products, customers).

Snapshot storage: Snapshots are stored in your browser's localStorage. Up to 10 most-recent snapshots are kept; older ones auto-delete.

Export file: A full .json file containing all products, orders, customers, losses, inventory history, settings, and uploaded images. Keep this file safe off-device.

⚠️ Browser-only warning: localStorage is tied to this browser on this device. If the browser cache is cleared, data will be lost. Export regularly and save the file to Google Drive, email, or a USB drive.

⚙️ Store Settings

Applies to every price shown across the site.

📦 Fulfillment Options

Customers can have orders delivered to their address.
Customers can pick up orders from your store.
Shown to customers who select the Pickup option at checkout.

💳 Payment Options

Customers paying online (GCash / Bank Transfer) can pay a down-payment now and the balance on delivery/pickup.
e.g. 50 means customers pay 50% now, 50% later.
🔒 Security note: This site never stores customer GCash PINs, card numbers, or online-banking passwords. Only the payment method name, amount paid, and balance due are saved. For real production use, integrate an official payment gateway (PayMongo, Xendit) that handles sensitive info on their secure servers.

📋 Cancellation Policy

Orders cancelled within this window forfeit any down-payment. Common values: 24, 48, 72.
